Explore Research Club
About Us

Who We Are

CTA Research is a premier sell-side equity research firm and professional personal finance education provider. With a coverage universe of more than 800 stocks across North America, Europe, Asia, and South Africa, we provide the global reach necessary for navigating today's interconnected markets.

Our Mission

Democratizing
Research

Our core mission is to democratize institutional-grade research. We believe that high-quality analysis and sophisticated valuation should be accessible to everyone, not just the world's largest investment managers. Through our exclusive Research Club, we deliver professional-level insights to individual and retail investors at affordable price points.

    Education & Training

    Professional
    Education

    Beyond our research capabilities, we are committed to shaping the next generation of financial experts. We offer the Pro Equity Research Program, a comprehensive training curriculum developed from the authoritative textbook authored by our Co-founder and Chief Research Analyst.

    Our leadership's dedication to professional excellence extends to ExamFit Prep School, a specialized platform gaining significant traction among South African aspiring financial professionals.

    Exclusive Access

    CTA Research
    Club

    Institutional-grade equity research delivered directly to you. Join thousands of investors who rely on CTA Research for rigorous, actionable analysis.

    Access Club Portal
    What You Get

    Club Benefits

    01

    Equity Research Reports

    In-depth, institutional-quality research on 800+ stocks across North America, Europe, Asia, and South Africa.

    02

    Valuation Models

    Proprietary DCF and relative valuation models, built using the same frameworks used by the world's top investment managers.

    03

    Market Commentary

    Weekly macro and sector commentary from our Chief Research Analyst, Kevin Radebe, CFA, CMT.

    04

    Stock Screener Access

    Filter our coverage universe by region, sector, valuation metric, and analyst rating.

    05

    Podcast & Webinars

    Exclusive audio and video content. Deep dives, earnings roundtables, and educational sessions — all on-demand.

    06

    Community & Q&A

    Direct access to analysts via live Q&A sessions and a community of serious investors.

    Products & Services

    The CTA
    Store

    Professional research tools, educational programs, and curated resources for the serious investor and aspiring analyst.

    📊
    Education

    Pro Equity Research Program

    A comprehensive training curriculum authored by Kevin Radebe, CFA, CMT. Master institutional valuation, financial modeling, and professional report writing.

    Includes: 12-module curriculum · Valuation templates · Capstone project · Certificate

    R4,999 once-off
    🔬
    Membership

    CTA Research Club

    Access institutional-grade equity research on 800+ stocks. Weekly commentary, valuation models, screener access, podcasts, and live Q&A sessions.

    Includes: Unlimited reports · Models · Screener · Podcast · Webinars · Community

    R199/mo & R499/yr
    📚
    Exam Prep

    ExamFit Prep School

    Specialized exam preparation for South African aspiring financial professionals. Bridging academic theory and investment industry demands.

    Includes: Practice exams · Study guides · Mock papers · Mentor support

    R1,499 per exam
    📖
    Textbook

    Equity Research Textbook

    The definitive reference by Kevin Radebe, CFA, CMT. Covers sell-side research methodology from industry analysis to target price derivation.

    Includes: Digital + print edition · Worked examples · Case studies

    R899 once-off

    Our Team

    The People
    Behind CTA

    Founded by credentialed professionals with a shared conviction: world-class research should not be the exclusive domain of the largest institutions.

    Management

    Leadership

    KR

    Kevin Radebe

    CFA · CMT  |  Co-Founder & Chief Research Analyst

    Kevin is a CFA Charterholder and Chartered Market Technician with extensive experience in sell-side equity research. He built the firm's research methodology from the ground up and authored the definitive equity research textbook.

    His work spans fundamental valuation, technical analysis, and portfolio construction across four continents. Kevin's dedication drives the Research Club and ExamFit Prep School.

    CD

    Charles Dlamini

    Co-Founder & Chief Operating Officer

    Charles brings operational excellence and strategic vision to CTA Research. As COO, he oversees day-to-day operations, client experience, and growth initiatives across financial services and technology.

    Charles is passionate about broadening access to professional-grade financial tools for retail investors and aspiring professionals across Africa and beyond.

    Legal

    Privacy
    Policy

    Last Updated: June 2025

    Overview

    Your Privacy
    Matters

    CTA Research (“we”, “our”, or “us”) is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services, including the CTA Research Club, Pro Equity Research Program, ExamFit Prep School, and associated publications.

    1. Information We Collect

    We may collect the following categories of personal information: Contact Information such as your name and email address when you register for our Research Club or contact us. Payment Information processed securely through third-party payment processors — we do not store card details. Usage Data including pages visited, time spent, and device information collected automatically through standard web analytics. Communications such as messages you send us via our contact form or email.

    2. How We Use Your Information

    We use the information we collect to: deliver and manage your Research Club membership or educational programme enrolment; process transactions and send related communications; respond to your enquiries and provide customer support; send periodic research updates, market commentary, and podcast notifications (you may opt out at any time); improve and personalise your experience on our platform; comply with applicable legal and regulatory obligations in South Africa and other jurisdictions where we operate.

    3. Sharing of Information

    We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our website, processing payments, or delivering communications — strictly under confidentiality agreements. We may disclose information where required by law or to protect our legal rights.

    4. Data Security

    We implement reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your information against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure. We encourage you to use strong passwords and to contact us immediately if you suspect any unauthorised use of your account.

    5. Cookies

    Our website may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience and analyse site usage. You may configure your browser to refuse cookies, though some features of our services may not function properly without them.

    6. Your Rights

    Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at ctaresearchoffice@gmail.com. We will respond to all requests within a reasonable timeframe and in accordance with applicable law, including South Africa’s Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA).

    7. Changes to This Policy

    We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with a revised “Last Updated” date. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

    For any privacy-related questions, contact us at ctaresearchoffice@gmail.com.

    Legal

    Terms of
    Service

    Last Updated: June 2025

    Agreement

    Terms &
    Conditions

    By accessing or using any CTA Research service — including this website, the CTA Research Club, the Pro Equity Research Program, ExamFit Prep School, and any associated publications or podcasts — you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

    1. Services Offered

    CTA Research provides sell-side equity research, market commentary, valuation models, educational programmes, and exam preparation services. Our Research Club offers subscription-based access to institutional-grade research reports and analysis. The Pro Equity Research Program and ExamFit Prep School are educational offerings designed to develop professional competence in equity research and financial analysis.

    2. Subscriptions & Payments

    Research Club subscriptions are billed at R199 per month (Starter) or R499 per year (Professional). Payments are due in advance. All fees are non-refundable except where required by applicable consumer protection law. We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days’ notice. Failure to pay may result in suspension or termination of access.

    3. Intellectual Property

    All content published by CTA Research — including research reports, valuation models, market commentary, podcast episodes, educational materials, and the equity research textbook — is the exclusive intellectual property of CTA Research and its co-founders. You may not reproduce, distribute, republish, or create derivative works from any CTA Research content without prior written permission. Personal, non-commercial use for your own investment decision-making is permitted.

    4. Not Financial Advice

    All content produced by CTA Research is for informational and educational purposes only. Nothing published constitutes personalised financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. We are a research and education provider, not a registered financial adviser. Past performance referenced in any research is not indicative of future results. Always consult a licensed financial professional before making investment decisions.

    5. User Conduct

    You agree not to: share your account credentials with any third party; use our content or services for commercial redistribution without authorisation; reverse-engineer or scrape our platform; engage in any conduct that disrupts the services or harms other users. Violation of these terms may result in immediate termination of your access without refund.

    6. Limitation of Liability

    To the maximum extent permitted by law, CTA Research and its co-founders shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services or reliance on any content we publish. This includes, without limitation, investment losses, loss of data, or business interruption.

    7. Governing Law

    These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the South African courts.

    8. Contact

    For questions about these Terms, contact us at ctaresearchoffice@gmail.com.

    Legal

    Disclaimer

    Last Updated: June 2025

    Important Notice

    Research
    Disclaimer

    Please read this disclaimer carefully before using any content or services provided by CTA Research. By accessing our research, commentary, educational materials, or podcast, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to the terms of this disclaimer.

    1. Not Investment Advice

    The research reports, market commentary, valuation models, stock screener outputs, podcast episodes, and all other content published by CTA Research are provided strictly for informational and educational purposes. Nothing published by CTA Research constitutes a solicitation, offer, recommendation, or personalised advice to buy, sell, or hold any security or financial instrument. CTA Research is a sell-side equity research and education firm — not a registered financial services provider or investment adviser.

    2. No Guarantee of Accuracy

    While CTA Research strives to produce rigorous, accurate, and well-researched content, we make no representations or warranties — express or implied — as to the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or timeliness of any information published. Market conditions change rapidly, and our research reflects the views of our analysts at a specific point in time. Errors and omissions may occur.

    3. Past Performance

    Any reference to historical returns, past analyst ratings, or prior investment recommendations is provided for context only and does not guarantee or imply future results. Equity investing involves significant risk, including the possible loss of principal. The value of investments can go up as well as down.

    4. Coverage Universe

    CTA Research covers more than 800 stocks across North America, Europe, Asia, and South Africa. Coverage of a security does not constitute an endorsement. Analyst opinions, price targets, and ratings may change without notice based on new information, market developments, or revised assumptions.

    5. Conflicts of Interest

    CTA Research analysts may from time to time hold positions in securities they cover. Where material conflicts of interest exist, CTA Research will endeavour to disclose them within the relevant research report. Subscribers are encouraged to conduct their own independent research and consult a licensed financial adviser before making any investment decision.

    6. Educational Content

    The Pro Equity Research Program, ExamFit Prep School, and the equity research textbook authored by Kevin Radebe, CFA, CMT are educational tools designed to develop analytical skills. Completion of these programmes does not guarantee employment, professional certification, or investment success.

    7. Third-Party Links

    Our website and publications may contain links to third-party websites or sources. CTA Research does not endorse, control, or take responsibility for the content, privacy practices, or accuracy of any third-party site.

    8. Jurisdiction

    This disclaimer is governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa. Users accessing CTA Research content from outside South Africa are responsible for ensuring compliance with their local laws and regulations regarding the receipt and use of financial research.

    Questions? Contact us at ctaresearchoffice@gmail.com.
